message:
feat(engine): lower all ImportClause variants to IR1/IR3 and implement nested destructuring with assignment-pattern defaults

Import lowering dispatch:
- Import lowering now dispatches on all 6 ImportClause variants, emitting
  correct IR1 sequences: ImportModule + GetProperty "default" for default
  imports, temp bindings + per-specifier GetProperty for named imports,
  namespace import binding, and combined default+named/namespace forms

Nested destructuring improvements:
- Object and array destructuring now uses temporary bindings to avoid
  source-overwrite bugs when a destructured binding name shadows the
  source variable
- AssignmentPattern default-value lowering implemented with
  JumpIfTruthy/StrictEqual against undefined sentinel
- lower_destructuring_to_ir1 signature expanded to take mutable
  bindings/scope for correct scope tracking
- New assign_pattern_from_source helper

IR2→IR3 lowering:
- ImportModule and ExportBinding now emit proper register-based
  instructions in the IR3 stage

Tests:
- 3 new tests for nested object/array destructuring and
  assignment-pattern default values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
